item.title: DW News. . German airline Lufthansa says several employees were injured after the nose gear of a Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner jet collapsed while the aircraft was parked at a gate at Frankfurt airport. The flight was later cancelled, and the employees are receivi - facebook.com
item.description: DW News. . German airline Lufthansa says several employees were injured after the nose gear of a Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner jet collapsed while the aircraft was parked at a gate at Frankfurt airport. The flight was later cancelled, and the employees are receivi  facebook.com
